title: Dutch Foods 'n Stuff
description: Adds typical Dutch foods to the game, like cheese, stroopwafels, bitterballen & more!
body:
![Dutch Foods N Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82616036d75d04297c6d16642ef6da69f33e099b.png)
# This mod adds a bunch of typical Dutch things and things associated with the Dutch.
[![fapi-badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![architectury-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/architectury-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>


<details>
<summary>Cheese</summary>

![Cheese Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0a6899c94c30fe0df2ffa710c9b4db987f5ebcc.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cheese Slicer</summary>

![Cheese Slicer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e19d28c0c9131807a3530ae2ebaea4c0e4c0c9.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cheese Slice</summary>

Make by right-clicking a Cheese Block with a Cheese Slicer

</details>


<details>
<summary>Cheese Block</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb78c52b71132c8d75534e48992f81e6470d447.png)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Stroopwafel</summary>

![Stroopwafel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2ca68d4000996395fbc597cf28b158a7d3da618.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Stamppot Boerenkool</summary>

![Stamppot Boerenkool Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecefea00388f4dbfcf299138100b464062477da6.png)

Can be any raw meat
</details>




<details>
<summary>Oliebol</summary>

Throw a dough ball into lava!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Dough Ball</summary>

![Dough Ball Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dddcff7c067b4ba00b9aeec3a3aa21d3097eb79c.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Oliebol With Powdered Sugar</summary>

![Oliebol w/ Sugar Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/200a9b1d3d848bff3870abc2fb1a4a52b7008ac7.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Cheese Soufle</summary>

![Cheese Soufle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad21e536b2d1a48ebbaceea5b442f1a148929056.png)

</details>





<details>
<summary>Bitterbal</summary>

![Bitterbal Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02685e2ef8d846eee10da6d7983143e06d8925af.png)

The meat and egg can be any cooked meat and any egg.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Clogs</summary>

![Clogs Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cd78e2beb31ded1b281ce17fc0bb3c13eb6c046.png)

Can be any wood variant.

</details>



</details>




**It currently adds:**
- Cheese
- Cheese blocks
- Cheese slices & slicer
- Clogs
- Stroopwafel
- Kale
- Stroopwafel
- Oliebollen
- Cheese Soufle
- *More*


**Possibly going to be added:**

- Bitterballen
- **_More_**
